sections.label: Riddle 19
sections.original:
Ic
on
siþe
seah ᛋ ᚱ ᚩ
ᚻ hygewloncne, heafodbeorhtne,
swiftne
ofer sælwong swiþe þrægan.
Hæfde him on hrycge hildeþryþe
ᚾ ᚩ ᛗ nægledne rad
ᚪ ᚾ ᛖ ᚹ. Widlast ferede
rynestrong on rade rofne ᚳ ᚩ
ᛇ ᚩ ᚪ ᚻ. For wæs þy beorhtre,
swylcra siþfæt. Saga hwæt ic hatte.
